description_long: This object is a round, shallow frying pan with a flat base and slightly raised sides, constructed from a dark, matte material that suggests cast iron or heavy-duty steel. The pan features a single, elongated handle that is straight and tapers slightly towards the end, with a visible hole for hanging. The rim of the pan is straight and moderately thick, providing structural integrity and preventing warping. The surface of the pan appears smooth but not glossy, indicating a utilitarian finish suitable for high-heat cooking. There are no visible brand logos or decorative markings on the pan or handle. The bottom of the pan is plain and unadorned, lacking any ridges, patterns, or stamps.
description: A round, dark frying pan with a straight handle and a smooth, matte finish. The pan has a hanging hole at the end of the handle and a plain, unmarked base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round pan body and the straight handle with a hanging hole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pan's shallow depth and the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the open pan interior and the handle extending away.
description_view_3: Angled side view displaying the pan's flat base and the handle's attachment.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight handle made of the same material as the pan, with a slight taper and a hanging hole at the end; no visible grip texture or covering.
attribute_rim_design: Straight, moderately thick rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth and plain with no visible pattern, ridges, or markings.
